settings.heading: Get Your Camera Repaired
settings.subtext: Expert film camera repair in Brooklyn.

settings.heading: What We Repair
settings.f1_desc: Full CLA and all mechanical repairs.

settings.heading: Camera Repair Pricing
settings.description: A non-refundable diagnostic fee is required before any repair work begins. All prices are estimates — final cost confirmed after bench inspection.
settings.row2_note: Non-refundable, required before any repair work begins
settings.row4_note: Applied when impact damage is present
settings.row24_note: Includes Soviet lenses, Leica, Zeiss, Macro, Fisheye, Tilt-shift, etc.

settings.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
settings.intro: Everything you need to know about our repair service.
settings.a1: The $50 diagnostic fee covers our technician's time to fully assess your camera. It is non-refundable.
settings.a2: Standard turnaround is 2–4 weeks from when we receive your camera.
settings.a3: We specialize in 35mm and medium format film cameras from all major brands.
settings.a4: Many repairs come with warranty, warranty times will be included in the quote.

settings.heading: Ready to Get Started?
settings.body: Mail in your camera or drop it off at our Brooklyn workshop.
